question: Q1
reason: The paper proposes four new range adaptor objects (views::from_big_endian, views::to_big_endian, views::from_little_endian, views::to_little_endian). The cited evidence is a code block from §2 Before/After Tables showing the proposed syntax in use (views::from_big_endian and views::to_big_endian in a pipeline). The quote appears verbatim in the paper. All three checks pass.
